actor_claims.actor_label: person or entity making such acquisition proposal
actor_claims.quote_text: the person or entity making such acquisition proposal

event_claims.description: Penford agreed to a no-solicitation covenant restricting it and its representatives from soliciting or facilitating acquisition proposals.
event_claims.quote_text: Penford has agreed that it will not, and it will cause its subsidiaries and their respective directors, officers, employees, investment bankers, financial advisors, attorneys, accountants or other advisors, agents and representatives not to, directly or indirectly:

event_claims.description: Penford may furnish information and participate in discussions if it receives a qualifying bona fide acquisition proposal that could lead to a superior proposal before shareholder approval.
event_claims.quote_text: However, if we receive a bona fide acquisition proposal prior to the time of the requisite approval of the merger agreement by our shareholders at a meeting called to approve the merger agreement, and if our board determines in good faith, after consulting with its outside counsel and its financial advisor, that such proposal constitutes or could reasonably be expected to lead to a “superior proposal”

event_claims.actor_label: person or entity making such acquisition proposal
event_claims.description: Penford may participate in discussions and negotiations regarding a qualifying acquisition proposal with the person making the proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: participate in discussions and negotiations regarding such acquisition proposal with the person making such acquisition proposal.

event_claims.description: Penford must notify Ingredion within 24 hours after receipt of an acquisition proposal or inquiry that could lead to an acquisition proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: Penford must within 24 hours advise Ingredion in writing of the receipt of any acquisition proposal or any inquiry, proposal or offer that could reasonably be expected to lead to an acquisition proposal

event_claims.description: Before shareholder approval, Penford's board may change its recommendation in response to a bona fide superior proposal.
event_claims.quote_text: prior to approval of the merger agreement by Penford’s shareholders at the special meeting, Penford or its board of directors, as applicable, may take the following actions in response to a bona fide superior proposal

event_claims.description: Penford may terminate the merger agreement to enter into an acquisition agreement for a superior proposal, subject to conditions.
event_claims.quote_text: the board may terminate the merger agreement to enter into an acquisition agreement with respect to such superior proposal
